data.name: Hentai Tales: C-D Girls
data.detailed_description:
遊戲玩法

在完成棘手的難題時享受一個感性的故事！
使用板上的所有正方形連接數字
完成難題後，您將解鎖性感的新圖像和故事的下一部分！
您能完成每個難題並結識所有女孩嗎？

故事背景

這是我每天的另一個例行程序，我使用伴遊應用程序要求漂亮的女孩去做“爸爸工作”。
這些漂亮的年輕女性只要有錢就願意做任何事情。對我來說確實是一種祝福。
所以我今天應該問誰...

人物

Misaki：

伴遊女孩身穿粉紅色的雙馬尾辮和精緻的化妝，穿著超級JK制服，對顧客來說很冷，但她的全球性氣質受到了極大的追捧。
儘管她經驗豐富，但她從未感到滿足，並且正在沉迷於慾望和空虛。

林恩：

“殺死數百人”的“女王”對她健康的青銅皮有一隻天藍色的馬尾辮，並穿著粗俗的JK制服。
她有很多積蓄，但保持了對工作的熱情，並且擅長營造一種使客戶感到賓至如歸的氛圍。

特徵

  • 20個美麗女孩的性感和色情圖像。
  • 一個夢幻般的色情故事，有著獨特的個性。
  • 如果您只想欣賞這個故事，就可以跳過難題。 （在難題期間按Enter）。
  • CG畫廊模式。 （完成拼圖後，單擊CG旁邊的左右按鈕）。

  • 儲存空間: 800 MB 可用空間

data.name: Hentai Tales: C-D Girls
data.detailed_description:
GamePlay

Enjoy a sensual story while completing tricky puzzles!
Connect the numbers sequentially, using all of the squares on the board
After completing a puzzle, you will unlock a sexy new image and the next part of the story!
Can you complete every puzzle and meet all of the girls?!

Story Background

It's another one of my daily routines where I use the escort app to ask pretty girls out to do "daddy work".
These pretty young women are willing to do anything as long as they have money. It's really a blessing for me.
So who should I ask out today...

Characters

Misaki:

The escort girl with pink twin ponytails and exquisite makeup, wearing a super short JK uniform, is cold to customers but is highly sought after for her world-weary temperament.
Although she is experienced, she has never been satisfied and is sinking in desire and emptiness.

Rinne:

The "Queen of Killing Hundreds" has a sky-blue side ponytail against her healthy bronze skin, and wears a vulgar modified JK uniform.
She has a lot of savings but maintains her passion for work, and is good at creating an atmosphere that makes her clients feel at home.

Features

  • 20 sexy and erotic images of beautiful girls.
  • A fantastical erotic story with girls who have unique personalities.
  • You can skip the puzzles if you just want to enjoy the story. (Press Enter during a puzzle).
  • CG Gallery mode. (Click the left and right buttons next to the CG after completing a puzzle).
